entries.definition:
b-s-s to scatter; to travel throughout the land; to crumble; to
drive gently; to stroke with the hand, to mix together. Of this root,
two forms occur once each in the Qur’an: بُسَّ bussa and بَسّ bass.

بُسَّ bussa [pass. v.; v. n. بَسّ bass] to be crumbled, to be
crushed, to be ground (56:5) وَبُسَّتِ الْجِبَالُ بَسًّا and the mountains are
ground to powder.

بُسَّ bussa [pass. v.; v. n. بَسّ bass] to be crumbled, to be
crushed, to be ground (56:5) وَبُسَّتِ الْجِبَالُ بَسًّا and the mountains are
